subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Jinab-i-Aqa Musa and Aqa Qanbar-'Ali have traversed vast distances, mountains, deserts and seas [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی جناب آقا موسا و آقا قنبر علی مسافه بعیده و کوه و صحرا و دریا طی
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @law of pilgrimage, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love of God
